subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Kingdom of Abha! Thus far have numerous epistles been sent, bearing a droplet from the oceans of love that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بملکوت ابهی تا بحال مکاتیب متعدده ارسال گشت و رشحی از بحور حب که در
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @praise and encouragement, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
